We are a startup based in Toronto which provides a completely new marketing channel for brands and agencies. Instead of working with few big influencers, Peersway allows you to work with hundreds of 'Nano influencers' for the same cost.

'Nano influencers' have smaller following on social media (often less than 10k followers), which means they mostly promote to their friends, families and acquaintances. Due to the personal nature of their connections, Peersway influencers deliver higher engagement while charging much less than big influencers. 

We provide a turn-key solution where we handle every aspect of the influencer campaign including shortlisting users, communicating requirements, reviewing Instagram posts and handling payments.

Short Description:
Adclusive är ett svenskt marknadsföringsnätverk som med sin banbrytande teknologi och användarvänlighet strävar efter att revolutionera upplevelsen av annonsering på internet.

Affiliatemarknadsföring är en internetmarknadsföringskanal som binder samman e-butiker och andra internetbaserade aktörer med publicister. En publicist kan vara allt från en hemsideägare till en Youtuber, där alla har samma mål – att marknadsföra det företag du representerar. Affiliatemarknadsföring har vuxit med 200% sedan 2015 och prognosen vittnar om att intresset växer i stadig takt. Anledningen till att fler väljer att avsätta en större del av sin marknadsföringsbudget är framförallt på grund av den prestationsbaserade modellen, där man enbart betalar för resultat.

På bara ett par år har e-handelslandksapet förändrats markant. Fler och fler företag etablerar sig på internet i takt med att andelen som handlar online ökar i rekordtakt. Marknadsförare har tagit till sig den prestationsbaserade annonsmodellen fullt ut och har gjort affiliatemarknadsföring mer attraktivt än någonsin! Men med det ökade intresset, samt de stora satsningarna och investeringarna som görs, ökar också förväntningarna på affiliateplattformarna. Adclusive har tagit sig an utmaningen att revolutionera marknaden med sofistikerade verktyg, unik spårningsteknologi och en helt ny flexibilitet då vi har våra alldeles egna utvecklare.

Marknadsföring på internet är föränderlig, och förändringarna kan komma snabbt! De kanaler man marknadsför sig på idag, kanske inte är de man marknadsför sig på imorgon. Därför är det viktigt att välja ett nätverk som har möjligheten och resurserna att implementera framtidens marknadsföringskanaler.

Short Description:
Famedads, influencer marketing sektöründe markalar ile içerik üreticileri arasında köprü kuran, güven ve verimlilik odaklı bir dijital pazar yeridir. Sektörün en büyük sorunları olan doğru eşleşmeyi bulma, şeffaf olmayan süreçler ve ödeme güvencesi gibi konulara net çözümler sunar.

Markalar İçin Famedads:
Gelişmiş filtreleme sistemi sayesinde, kampanyanızın hedeflerine ve bütçesine en uygun içerik üreticilerini saniyeler içinde keşfedebilirsiniz. Ücretleri ve sunulan hizmetleri net bir şekilde görerek belirsizliği ortadan kaldırır, yatırımınızın karşılığını alacağınızdan emin olursunuz.

İçerik Üreticileri İçin Famedads:
Yaratıcılığınızı ve emeğinizi sergileyebileceğiniz profesyonel bir profil oluşturma imkânı tanır. Kendi hizmet paketlerinizi ve ücretlerinizi belirleyerek emeğinizin değerini korursunuz. En önemlisi, ödemenizin güvende olduğunu bilerek işinize odaklanabilirsiniz.

Platformun Kalbi: Güvenli Havuz Sistemi
Famedads'in en ayırt edici özelliği, tüm iş birliklerini güvence altına alan Güvenli Havuz Sistemi'dir. Anlaşma sağlandığında, marka tarafından yapılan ödeme Famedads havuzunda tutulur. "Medyayı 360 derece planlayın"

TV, basın, radyo, sinema, açıkhava, dijital mecralar

prettysocial media ist eine in ihrem Konzept einzigartige Social Content Distribution Agentur mit Standorten in München, Amsterdam und Kopenhagen. Seit 2013 verlängert prettysocial media Werbebotschaften über die Social-Media Fanpages bekannter Medienmarken. Die reichweitenstarke Distribution von Inhalten im Namen der Medienmarken erfolgt als Post oder Ad – alles unter unserem Motto "Neue Wege für starke Marken".

Der USP von prettysocial media ist dabei die Verfügbarkeit der Medienpartner auf Social Media. Die verlagsübergreifende Medienauswahl garantiert euch die Verfügbarkeit einer Marke oder eines Verlages als Absender und damit Markenbotschafter für die auszusteuernde Kampagne. Von Branding bis Leadgenerierung bietet prettysocial media umfassende und effektive Lösungen, gezieltes Targeting, sowie vielfältige und individuelle Optimierungsmöglichkeiten, um die individuellen Kampagnenziele der Werbetreibenden zu realisieren.

Wir bei prettysocial media sind Online-Marketing Spezialisten aus allen Disziplinen und arbeiten an der gesamten Wertschöpfung – von Idee und Kreation bis hin zur maßgeschneiderten Distribution. Zum Kundenkreis von prettysocial media zählen namhafte Unternehmen aus den unterschiedlichsten Branchen, darunter Microsoft, die Deutsche Bahn, die Sparkasse, Landrover und Miele.

Short Description:
ROC is the measurement and operating system for creator marketing — built to help brands move beyond vanity metrics and into real outcomes. In a world obsessed with acronyms (ROI, CAC, LTV, ROAS, CPM), we created the one that actually matters: ROC: Return On Creators.

We give brands the stage, the system, and the scoreboard to win with creators. Louder, faster, and bigger than anything before. With ROC, every partnership is a setlist, every campaign is a show, and every outcome is an encore. Creators aren't extras, they're the headliners.

Our platform hardwires discovery, targeting, intelligent briefing, and 1:1 activation into one connected workflow. That means brands can find the right creators, activate them at scale, and finally prove results with GMV, not hype. The days of "spray and pray" outreach and meaningless impressions are over. ROC ties every creator back to real sales.

We live by a few rules — our ROC Bible:

Proof Over Hype: Sales, not smoke. The scoreboard doesn't lie.

Earned Swagger: Confidence backed by receipts.

Creators Are Partners: Not talent to manage. Equal seats at the table.

No Suits, No Bloat: Lean, raw, built to perform.

Always On Tour: Momentum is oxygen — launch > perfect.

One Life, One Stage: This isn't a job. It's your shot to make noise.

Behind ROC is the team that built Trndsttrs, the #1 Gen Z agency partnered with TikTok since 2017. We've run the campaigns, scaled the shops, and proven the playbook. Now, we've turned those lessons into a platform and a movement.

We're not here to look like another SaaS dashboard. We're here to run marketing like an arena show — bold, undeniable, alive. ROC is the roar of the crowd, the lightning bolt in the dark, the proof that creators are the new main stage of commerce.

For brands ready to stop experimenting and start scaling, ROC is the operating system and the metric that finally makes creator marketing predictable.

Short Description:
At Carrick Connections, our focus is on helping food brands connect with influencers on TikTok and build successful influencer marketing campaigns. 

we understand that finding the right influencers for your brand can be a challenging task. That's why we offer assistance in identifying the best influencers for your brand and building campaigns that deliver tangible results.

To identify the right influencers for your brand, we take a number of factors into consideration, including their audience demographics, engagement rates, content quality, and overall fit with your brand values and messaging. We also consider their past collaborations and success in driving engagement with your brand.

Once we have identified the best influencers for your brand, we work with you to develop a campaign strategy that aligns with your marketing goals and budget. This may involve creating custom content, coordinating product placements, hosting giveaways or contests, or any other tactics that will help to drive results for your brand.

Throughout the campaign, we track the performance of the influencers and the content they create, and provide regular reports and insights to help you understand the impact of the campaign. We also work with you to optimise the campaign as needed to ensure that it is delivering the best possible results for your brand.

Overall, our goal is to help you connect with the right influencers and build campaigns that drive tangible results for your brand on TikTok. Please don't hesitate to reach out and connect with us to learn more about how we can help you achieve your marketing goals.

Panache is a mobile application providing brands a seamless way to connect with Micro Influencers. Through the Panache app you are able to bring a product or service to the face of millions by strategically placing it in front of a mass audience on social media. 

The capabilities of Micro Influencer marketing has shown tremendous results at testing phase and is now available for brands to use. Micro Influencer marketing can bring about better results than traditional forms of marketing within a time scale of a few weeks if not days. Word of mouth marketing and the power of persuasion has and will always be the main driving force behind brand recognition and increased sales. 

Micro Influencers are you, me and everyone else on social media. People with followers ranging from 100 to 2000 and are limited to family and friends. The benefits of this are endless as the relationships we have with our followers are close, personal and authentic. With an audience so small, it's easy to go unnoticed but when compared to a Macro Influencer, our engagement levels are almost 40 times higher. Micro Influencers are impartial, are brand advocates and when brought together are able to share conversation on a mass scale leading to towering results.

VAŠA PRIČA. NAŠ POTPIS.

Drugačiji smo od drugih nama sličnih, ali to su vam ti isti rekli za sebe. Nismo tipična agencija koja samo delegira. Nismo ni tipična produkcija koja izvršava delegirano. Mi smo kreativni koncept. Javite nam se jer s nama je komunikacija vrlo jednostavna stvar. Jednostavna kao pričanje priče, a mi znamo sa slovima i imamo stil.

Upoznajmo se što prije. Ne dopustite da vam promakne naša ideja, vaša na sav glas pričana priča.
